response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience and demonstrated technical versatility, including some C++ exposure via NI LabWindows™/CVI and a bachelor’s thesis involving C++ for audio synthesis, but lacks consistent, deep C++ development experience over 8–12 years and shows minimal evidence of industrial automation, IEC 62443, MQTT, or secure development lifecycle practices required for the role.
strengths: Proven experience with C++ in industrial tooling (NI LabWindows™/CVI) and real-time audio systems
Strong background in event-driven architectures, message brokers, and open-source platform development
Excellent communication, mentoring, and documentation skills demonstrated through workshops and open-source contributions
concerns: Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang; C++ experience is sporadic and not recent or core to recent roles
No clear evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443 security compliance experience
Lacks demonstrable hands-on work with cloud platforms (Azure), multi-threaded C++ systems, or message brokers like Kafka/RabbitMQ in production
